message:
fix(genome): address core review issues — API consistency, performance, safety

- agentCount() now O(1) instead of O(n) with allocation
- initFromRoot() and syncRoot() use this.rootDir instead of taking a
  parameter, eliminating the foot-gun of passing inconsistent dirs
- loadFromDisk() automatically calls loadRoot(), removing the manual
  two-step dance that callers could forget
- Reinstated initFromRoot() guard against double-initialization
- syncRoot() reuses loadRoot() instead of duplicating rootAgents
  population logic
- Updated all callers and tests for the new parameter-less signatures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
